sources.claim: Triennial does NOT run in 2026; next edition 24 Apr – 5 Sep 2027

sources.claim: Triennial; skips 2026, next edition 2027

sources.claim: Festival passes sold out; weekends 17–19 + 24–26 July 2026

sources.claim: Biennial; 13–16 August 2026, Japan theme

sources.title: B-Europe — international ticketing
sources.claim: Since 15 Dec 2024 international tickets are valid only at the named Belgian station

sources.title: Ghent–Lille train times
sources.claim: Lille is the only direct international from Ghent (~1h08)

sources.title: Eurostar destinations
sources.claim: Book Paris and London four-plus months out for the cheap fares
